Operation 'getBingSearchVolume' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. While summary is clear, description is incomplete compared to Google operation. It only mentions search volume but doesn't clarify what other metrics are returned (CPC, competition data). Adding expected output details improves AI agent understanding of what data will be available.

data.current_description: Retrieve exact search volume data for keywords from Bing.

data.reasoning: While summary is clear, description is incomplete compared to Google operation. It only mentions search volume but doesn't clarify what other metrics are returned (CPC, competition data). Adding expected output details improves AI agent understanding of what data will be available.
